news.summary: In Herlev, Denmark, on May 8, 2025, Nordic Bioscience revealed the launch of the PRO-C3 test by Roche Diagnostics on their cobas analyzers. The Roche Elecsys® PRO-C3, in conjunction with the ADAPT formula which takes into account age, diabetes status, PRO-C3 levels, and platelet count, is now available for assessing liver fibrosis severity. The collaboration offers a significant advancement in liver health monitoring, with the PRO-C3 test providing crucial information that could potentially alter the future of diagnosing and managing liver fibrosis. This development marks a pivotal moment in healthcare as it combines cutting-edge technology with medical expertise to combat a pressing global health issue.
news.headline: Nordic Bioscience's PRO-C3 test is launched by Roche Diagnostics on cobas analysers to assess liver fibrosis severity.

news.summary: In Singapore on May 8, 2025, QDX extends congratulations to A/Prof. Giuseppe Barca, their Co-Founder and Head of Research, for winning the prestigious 2025 Dirac Medal. This award is recognized as the most esteemed international accolade for emerging researchers in the fields of theoretical and computational chemistry. A/Prof. Barca's exceptional work has secured him this honor, highlighting his significant contributions to the scientific community.
news.headline: A/Prof. Giuseppe Barca of QDX receives 2025 Dirac Medal, highest honor for early-career researchers in chemistry.

news.summary: Bitcoin mining has become profitable in 2025, with Bitcoin trading at $95,000 and transaction fees rising post-2024 halving. However, mining with a gaming PC is inefficient and unprofitable compared to ASIC miners due to low performance, high energy costs, and hardware wear-and-tear. ASICs dominate the mining scene, producing trillions of hashes per second compared to a few hundred megahashes per second from GPUs. Mining Bitcoin with a high-end GPU like the RTX 4090 results in high power consumption without significant earnings. After Sept. 30, 2025, 4GB GPUs will no longer work due to DAG size limits. According to WhatToMine, alternative cryptocurrencies like Ethereum Classic (ETC), Ravencoin (RVN), and Monero (XMR) are more GPU-friendly options for mining on gaming PCs in 2025.
news.headline: Bitcoin mining is enticing as BTC hits $95,000 in May 2025. Gaming PCs can mine, but ASICs dominate due to efficiency. Opt for altcoins like Ethereum Classic, Ravencoin, Monero for GPU mining.

news.summary: A recent report revealed that the global number of COVID-19 cases has surpassed 150 million, with over 3.1 million deaths recorded. The United States has the highest number of cases, with over 32 million infections and 574,000 deaths. India follows closely with more than 18 million cases and over 200,000 deaths. The situation remains critical in many countries, as efforts to vaccinate populations continue. The World Health Organization has emphasized the importance of following safety measures to curb the spread of the virus.
news.headline: Unaudited Q1 2025 financial data released by Galaxy Entertainment Group.

news.summary: NielsenIQ (NIQ) recently unveiled its global expansion plans for NIQ Product Insights (NPI), a solution aimed at offering comprehensive information on product attributes that consumers seek when shopping. NPI, already popular in the U.S. with top retailers and CPG manufacturers, is set to be launched in 25 more countries. This market-leading solution provides detailed insights into dietary preferences, sustainability factors, and clean label characteristics that influence consumer purchasing decisions.
news.headline: NielsenIQ expands NIQ Product Insights globally, offering CPG & retail enterprises detailed product attribute catalogue.

news.summary: Xsolla, a prominent company in video game commerce, has recently acquired Ludo, a platform known for enhancing community engagement through code-free social quests. This acquisition is a strategic move that brings Ludo's advanced technology under Xsolla's umbrella. By integrating Ludo's questing tools with Xsolla's Web Shop and other Rewards Solutions, developers worldwide can leverage these offerings to boost player engagement, enhance retention rates, and explore new monetization possibilities. This development marks a significant step in Xsolla's efforts to expand its services and strengthen its position in the industry.
news.headline: Xsolla acquires Ludo for player engagement; Ludo's tech to boost Xsolla's portfolio; enhance player retention and monetization.

news.summary: Astronomer has recently experienced significant growth with the launch of Apache Airflow® 3 and increased funding, prompting the company to expand its operations in EMEA. This expansion comes following a surge in customer interest and support for their flagship product, Astro, the premier DataOps platform leveraging the capabilities of Apache Airflow®. The developments have been observed in London on May 8, 2025.
news.headline: Astronomer opens new London office due to high demand in EMEA following release of Apache Airflow® 3; London, May 8, 2025.

news.summary: London, May 8, 2025 - Tech entrepreneur Tim Stokely, known for founding OnlyFans, has introduced Subs.com, a platform geared towards creators that prioritizes brand-friendliness and community-building. The platform aims to empower all creators and help them increase their subscriber count, tapping into a global market.
news.headline: OnlyFans founder Tim Stokely launches Subs.com, a creator-first platform; aims to empower all creators to 'Get More Subs'.

news.summary: In London on May 8, 2025, Cadent, the leading gas distribution network in the UK and a member of GD4S, announced its partnership with OverIT as their strategic Field Service Management (FSM) software provider. The implementation of OverIT's NextGen Platform will assist 3,600 users, which includes field engineers and other staff members.
news.headline: Cadent partners with OverIT for FSM platform to benefit 3,600 users in the UK's gas distribution network.

news.summary: The first patient has been administered with a combination of roginolisib and dostarlimab, with or without docetaxel, in a study for patients with non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) who have advanced after previous immunotherapy/chemotherapy treatment. The study aims to assess the safety of the combination and investigate if directing PI3Kδ along with immunotherapy could potentially regulate the immune system. This study could offer valuable insights into the efficacy of this combination therapy for NSCLC patients who have not responded to prior treatments.
news.headline: iOnctura begins Phase I/II trial for NSCLC with roginolisib + dostarlimab +/- docetaxel. Evaluate safety and impact on immune system in patients.

news.summary: In Tokyo, it has been announced that Accenture will be acquiring Yumemi, a prominent digital services and products provider located in Japan. This acquisition marks a significant move in the industry.
news.headline: Accenture buys Yumemi in Japan to speed up digital product launches, further amplifying expertise.

news.summary: A recent report indicates that the global annual revenue of the technology sector has reached $5 trillion. This marks a significant increase of 10% compared to the previous year. The report also reveals that the number of internet users worldwide has surpassed 5 billion, with a notable growth in developing countries. Additionally, the data shows that the average daily time spent on social media platforms has risen to 2.5 hours per person. These numbers demonstrate the rapid expansion and influence of technology in today's interconnected world.
news.headline: NTT plans $16.5B tender offer for NTT Data as part of AI strategy.

news.summary: Approximately 60,000 Bitcoin addresses related to LockBit's ransomware infrastructure were leaked following a breach of the group's dark web affiliate panel. The leak included a MySQL database dump shared publicly online, with no private keys leaked. LockBit is a notorious crypto ransomware group, with 10 countries launching a joint operation in February 2024 to disrupt its activities due to causing billions in damages to infrastructure. The leaked information could aid analysts in tracing the group's financial flows. The database contained 20 tables, including details on ransomware builds and negotiation messages between victims and the organization. The breach appears linked to the Everest ransomware site breach, indicating potential connections between the two incidents. The exposure of addresses allows for tracking patterns and linking past ransom payments to known wallets, showcasing the role of crypto in ransomware activities. A related report suggests that crypto crime in 2024 may have exceeded $51 billion, surpassing reported figures. Bitcoin proponent Adam Back believes that the Bitcoin price cycle will be significantly larger, though it may still surpass $100,000.
news.headline: LockBit ransomware gang hacked, exposing 60K Bitcoin addresses but no private keys leaked. Analysts suspect breach linked to Everest ransomware. Law enforcement can now track illicit financial flows.

news.summary: In Taipei on May 8, 2025, Chunghwa Telecom Co., Ltd. (TAIEX: 2412, NYSE: CHT) announced its unaudited operating results for the first quarter of 2025. The report adhered to Taiwan-International Financial Reporting standards. No specific details were provided.
news.headline: Chunghwa Telecom releases un-audited Q1 2025 results - 2412 TAIEX, NYSE: CHT. Figures aligned with Taiwan-IFRS.

news.summary: A new manufacturing plant is set to initiate operations in Sri City, India by the end of 2026. LG Electronics India Ltd. (LGEIL) has confirmed the start of construction for its upcoming facility in Sri City, Andhra Pradesh. The ceremony marking this milestone occurred on May 8, 2025. This plant is expected to bolster job creation and economic growth in the region, potentially offering numerous employment opportunities. With this development, LG Electronics aims to strengthen its presence in the Indian market and cater to the growing demand for its products. The initiative signifies a significant investment in the infrastructure and manufacturing sector, indicating the company's commitment to expanding its operations.
news.headline: LG Electronics India Limited starts building third manufacturing plant in Sri City, India, expected to be operational by end of 2026.

news.summary: Anthony Scaramucci, the founder of SkyBridge Capital, criticized President Donald Trump's stance on cryptocurrency policies. He mentioned in an interview with cryptocurrency expert Anthony Pompliano that aired Wednesday that he disagreed with Trump's policies on tariffs and trade. Despite this, Scaramucci believed that these policies could potentially benefit Bitcoin in the long run, stating that if market chaos and disruptions in the global trading system persist, more individuals may turn to Bitcoin. He highlighted Bitcoin as a safe haven option and suggested that the current situation could make a strong case for Bitcoin's appeal. For further details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Scaramucci criticizes Trump's crypto policies, predicts Bitcoin benefits from mayhem. Full story at Benzinga.com.

news.summary: Approximately 60,000 Bitcoin addresses linked to LockBit ransomware were compromised in a breach, with a leaked MySQL database dump providing crucial crypto-related information for tracking illicit financial flows. Ransomware is a malware that encrypts files or systems for ransom payment, usually in Bitcoin, with LockBit being a notorious ransomware group causing significant damages to key infrastructure. Although no private keys were leaked, leaked database content included ransomware builds and negotiation messages. The breach may be connected to the Everest ransomware incident, pointing to the crucial role of crypto in ransomware payments. The exposure of addresses enables tracking and links to past ransom payments. The incident underscores the significance of blockchain analysis in combating ransomware attacks.
news.headline: 60K BTC addresses leaked from LockBit ransomware group in hack. 10 countries targeted group causing billions in damage. No private keys leaked. Analysts suggest link to Everest ransomware breach. Exposes crypto's role in ransomware economy. Law enforcement can track payments.
